files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+---
+title: Add OpenTelemetry log export package
+type: change
+authors:
+  - mavam
+components:
+  - otel
+created: 2026-03-13T08:25:41Z
+---
+
+Added an experimental `otel` package for reshaping Tenzir events into OTLP JSON
+logs payloads.
+
+The package includes three user-defined operators:
+
+- `otel::attributes` to convert a record into OTLP `KeyValue[]`
+- `otel::logrecord` to build one OTLP `LogRecord`
+- `otel::export_logs` to wrap a log record in an OTLP logs export payload
+
+The package also includes tests covering attribute conversion, log record
+construction, OTLP envelope generation, and an end-to-end ESXi syslog example.

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+from {
+  ts: 2024-01-15T11:00:45Z,
+  observed: 2024-01-15T11:00:46Z,
+  sev_num: 9,
+  sev_text: "INFO",
+  msg: "User login successful",
+  attrs: {
+    user_id: "alice",
+    source_ip: 192.168.1.100,
+    attempts: 1,
+    success: true,
+  },
+}
+otel::logrecord attrs,
+  body=msg,
+  time=ts,
+  observed_time=observed,
+  severity_number=sev_num,
+  severity_text=sev_text
+select log_record

@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+---
+description: Converts a record field into OTLP log attributes.
+args:
+  positional:
+    - name: input
+      type: field
+      description: Record field to convert to OTLP KeyValue entries.
+---
+
+attributes = null if $input == null else $input.keys().map(k => {
+  key: k,
+  value: {
+    // Shortcut on purpose: until we add proper arrayValue/kvlistValue/bytesValue
+    // support, stringify unsupported non-null kinds instead of emitting an
+    // empty AnyValue.
+    stringValue: $input[k] if $input[k] != null and type_of($input[k]).kind == "string" else
+                 $input[k].string() if $input[k] != null and type_of($input[k]).kind in ["ip", "subnet", "time", "duration"] else
+                 $input[k].string() if $input[k] != null and type_of($input[k]).kind not in ["string", "ip", "subnet", "time", "duration", "bool", "int64", "uint64", "double"] else
+                 null,
+    boolValue: $input[k] if $input[k] != null and type_of($input[k]).kind == "bool" else null,
+    intValue: $input[k].string() if $input[k] != null and type_of($input[k]).kind in ["int64", "uint64"] else null,
+    doubleValue: $input[k] if $input[k] != null and type_of($input[k]).kind == "double" else null,
+  },
+})

@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+---
+description: Wraps one OTLP LogRecord in an OTLP logs export payload.
+args:
+  positional:
+    - name: resource
+      type: field
+      description: Record field that becomes OTLP resource attributes.
+  named:
+    - name: log_record
+      type: field
+      description: Field containing an OTLP LogRecord.
+    - name: scope_name
+      type: string
+      default: ""
+      description: Instrumentation scope name.
+    - name: scope_version
+      type: string
+      default: ""
+      description: Instrumentation scope version.
+---
+
+otel::attributes $resource
+
+select resourceLogs = [
+  {
+    resource: {
+      attributes: attributes,
+    },
+    scopeLogs: [
+      {
+        scope: {
+          name: $scope_name,
+          version: $scope_version,
+        },
+        logRecords: [$log_record],
+      },
+    ],
+  },
+]

@@ -0,0 +1,70 @@
+---
+description: Builds one OTLP LogRecord from the current event.
+args:
+  positional:
+    - name: attributes
+      type: field
+      description: Record field that becomes OTLP attributes.
+  named:
+    - name: body
+      type: field
+      default: null
+      description: Field to encode as the OTLP body AnyValue.
+    - name: time
+      type: field
+      default: null
+      description: Event timestamp field.
+    - name: observed_time
+      type: field
+      default: null
+      description: Observation timestamp field.
+    - name: severity_number
+      type: field
+      default: null
+      description: OTLP severity number.
+    - name: severity_text
+      type: field
+      default: null
+      description: OTLP severity text.
+    - name: flags
+      type: field
+      default: null
+      description: OTLP log flags.
+    - name: trace_id
+      type: field
+      default: null
+      description: Trace identifier, typically a hex string.
+    - name: span_id
+      type: field
+      default: null
+      description: Span identifier, typically a hex string.
+---
+
+_body_kind = type_of($body).kind if $body != null else null
+
+otel::attributes $attributes
+
+log_record = {
+  timeUnixNano: $time.since_epoch().count_nanoseconds().string() if $time != null else null,
+  observedTimeUnixNano: $observed_time.since_epoch().count_nanoseconds().string() if $observed_time != null else null,
+  severityNumber: $severity_number,
+  severityText: $severity_text,
+  body: {
+    // Shortcut on purpose: until we add proper arrayValue/kvlistValue/bytesValue
+    // support, stringify unsupported non-null body kinds instead of emitting an
+    // empty AnyValue.
+    stringValue: $body if _body_kind == "string" else
+                 $body.string() if _body_kind in ["ip", "subnet", "time", "duration"] else
+                 $body.string() if _body_kind not in ["string", "ip", "subnet", "time", "duration", "bool", "int64", "uint64", "double"] else
+                 null,
+    boolValue: $body if _body_kind == "bool" else null,
+    intValue: $body.string() if _body_kind in ["int64", "uint64"] else null,
+    doubleValue: $body if _body_kind == "double" else null,
+  } if $body != null else null,
+  attributes: move attributes,
+  flags: $flags,
+  traceId: $trace_id,
+  spanId: $span_id,
+}
+
+drop _body_kind

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+id: otel
+name: OpenTelemetry
+author: Tenzir
+author_icon: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/.tenzir.svg
+package_icon: |
+  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tenzir/library/main/otel/package.svg
+description: |
+  This package contains experimental operators for reshaping Tenzir events into
+  OpenTelemetry (OTLP JSON) structures.
+
+  The first focus is logs: converting a record of attributes into OTLP
+  `KeyValue[]` and building one OTLP `LogRecord` per input event.
+categories:
+- mappings

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+<166>1 2026-02-11T18:01:45.587Z esxi-host-05.mgmt.example.com Hostd 2099494 - [Originator@6876 sub="Vimsvc.TaskManager" opID="b7e42f1a-c9-3d80" sid="7f3a1b2c" user="vpxuser:VSPHERE.LOCAL\vpxd-extension-a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"] Task Completed : haTask--vim.vslm.host.CatalogSyncManager.queryCatalogChange-22290602 Status success

@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+from_file env("TENZIR_INPUT") {
+  read_syslog
+}
+
+originator = structured_data["Originator@6876"]
+user_parts = originator.user.split(":")
+domain_parts = user_parts[1].split(r#"\"#)
+task = message.parse_grok(r#"Task %{WORD:task_state} : %{DATA:task_id} Status %{WORD:task_status}"#)
+
+task_type = task.task_id.replace_regex(r#"^.*\."#, "").replace_regex(r#"-[0-9]+$"#, "")
+
+attrs = {
+  "syslog.facility": facility,
+  "syslog.severity": severity,
+  "process.pid": process_id.int(),
+  subsystem: originator.sub,
+  "operation.id": originator.opID,
+  "session.id": originator.sid,
+  "user.name": user_parts[0],
+  "user.domain": domain_parts[0],
+  "task.id": task.task_id,
+  "task.type": task_type,
+  "task.status": task.task_status,
+  "task.state": task.task_state.to_lower(),
+}
+
+resource = {
+  "host.name": hostname,
+  "service.name": app_name,
+  "product.name": "VMware ESXi",
+  "product.vendor": "VMware",
+}
+
+trace_id = ""
+span_id = ""
+severity_number = 9
+severity_text = "INFO"
+
+otel::logrecord attrs,
+  body=message,
+  time=timestamp,
+  observed_time=timestamp,
+  severity_number=severity_number,
+  severity_text=severity_text,
+  trace_id=trace_id,
+  span_id=span_id
+
+otel::export_logs resource,
+  log_record=log_record,
+  scope_name="syslog-collector",
+  scope_version="1.0.0"

+  msg: "User login successful",
+  attrs: {
+    user_id: "alice",
+    source_ip: 192.168.1.100,
+    attempts: 1,
+    success: true,
+  },
+  resource: {
+    "host.name": "app-01.example.com",
+    "service.name": "syslog",
+    "product.name": "Example Product",
+    "product.vendor": "Example Vendor",
+  },
+}
+otel::logrecord attrs,
+  body=msg,
+  time=ts,
+  observed_time=observed,
+  severity_number=sev_num,
+  severity_text=sev_text
+otel::export_logs resource,
+  log_record=log_record,
+  scope_name="syslog-collector",
+  scope_version="1.0.0"
